text.tspan: Validate the redirect_uri amongst whitelisted redirect_uri's
Hit the salesforce oauth token API using http client.
Upsert salesforce oAuth tokens in salesforce_oauth_tokens.
Update the salesforceUser object, set isNewUser variable to false and get the decryptedSalt from salesforceUser

svg.text: Call connectToSalesforce method of auth service
Call the getTokens method of salesforce get tokens wrapper
Get get salesforce organization by external organization id from tokensData.
Upsert salesforce organization data in salesforce_organizations.
Get salesforce user using salesforceUserId from tokensData
Call the getUserIdentity method of salesforce get identity wrapper
